<!-- indicator: fig-opioid-analgesic-rx-aar -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-opioid-analgesic-rx-aar
#| fig-cap: 'Opioid Analgesics Prescriptions, Age-Adjusted Rate per 1,000 Population, 2020–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Opioid Analgesics Prescriptions, Age-Adjusted Rate per 1,000 Population, 2020–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-opioid-analgesic-rx-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
